D1 Optics L5 Evaluate Reference

Evanescent Wave Decay

push past the critical angle and watch the field bleed exponentially into forbidden territory

At total internal reflection, a non-propagating evanescent field exists in the "forbidden" medium. Its amplitude decays exponentially with a penetration depth d_p of about λ/4 just past θ_c.

Slide θ, the dense-medium index, and the wavelength. The gold band below the interface visualises |E|(z), and the right plot shows the same as a curve.
